title: Ethereum Treasury Firm Sharplink Buys ETH After 8-Month Hiatus
summary: Sharplink, the second-largest corporate holder of ether, purchased 5,000 ETH ($7.85 million) on Thursday. This is its first buy since October 2025, despite holding a $1.8 billion paper loss on its holdings.
body:
Sharplink, a major Ethereum treasury firm, has made its first ether (ETH) purchase in eight months. The company bought 5,000 ETH, valued at approximately $7.85 million, on Thursday. This marks a significant move, as Sharplink had not added to its holdings since October 2025.

Despite this purchase, Sharplink is still sitting on a substantial paper loss of around $1.8 billion. The firm is the second-largest corporate holder of ether, making its investment decisions noteworthy in the crypto community. The purchase comes amid fluctuating market conditions, signaling potential confidence in Ethereum's long-term value.

This acquisition could indicate Sharplink's belief in Ethereum's future, despite its current paper losses. For everyday investors, this move might serve as a signal to reconsider their positions in ETH. It highlights the importance of long-term strategy in crypto investments, even in the face of short-term losses.

Investors should watch for further movements from Sharplink and other major holders, as their actions can influence market trends. Keeping an eye on Ethereum's price movements and any additional purchases or sales by large holders could provide insights into the market's direction.
